title: Leadelta
technologies: Next JS | Nest JS | Typescript | ShadCN UI | MongoDB | VapiAi | Hubspot | Twilio | OpenAI | Google Apis
description: Developed an AI-powered platform (Leadelta) with Admin and Client portals to automate customer interactions and lead management. Implemented Voice, SMS, and Inbound/Outbound agents for seamless communication using Vapi AI via Twilio. Provided full control for users to configure and manage agent settings as per their needs. Built continuous learning features to improve agent performance over time. Enabled automated booking through AI agents. Integrated HubSpot CRM for lead generation and implemented workflow automation.

title: Xtreme Web App
technologies: React JS | Node JS | Bootstrap | PrimeReact | Firebase| OpenAi | MongoDB
description: Developed an admin and client portal where profiles, workout plans, meal plan subscription plans, charts, statuses, chat application and AI-generated workout and meal plans are all managed

title: NCS-Railway
technologies: React JS | HTML/CSS/SCSS | Bootstrap | PrimeReact | Node | Sql
description: Industrial project in production for the railways, with dedicated admin and ticketing portals. Tickets are processed automatically with full features including printing, fares, booking, train timetables, and complete operational management.

title: ZiggleBee
technologies: Next JS | Nest JS | Typescript | Material UI | Twilio | MongoDB | Stripe
description: Developed ZiggleBee, an accessibility-focused platform for disabled users with Admin and Owner portals. Implemented subscription-based plans with Stripe integration for automated payments and feature access control. Built a template builder system to create accessible content. The platform enables users to manage subscriptions, features, and settings with ease while ensuring an inclusive experience.

title: Playli
technologies: React JS | Node JS | MySql | ShadCN | Bootstrap
description: Playli is a digital platform designed to connect people through real-world sports. It allows users to find nearby players, join open games, or create their own sports activities. The main purpose of Playli is to bring everyday athletes together, making it easier to organize games and build a local sports community. The platform facilitates connections between players but does not manage or control the events themselves.

title: Ultramarble
technologies: Next JS | Nest Js | Laravel | Typescript | Material UI | MySql
description: A job-driven workflow where work orders are created and customized for marble and related products. The system builds full visualizations with dimensions and product features, renders marble layouts, and assigns tasks to team staff.

title: APP-IN-SNAP CMS
technologies: React JS | HTML/CSS/SCSS | Bootstrap | PrimeReact | Node | MySql
description: An in-house office product that works as a CMS (Content Management System) and HRMS (Human Resource Management System), covering employees, leave, attendance, timelines, invoices, events, and many additional operational features.

title: QED E-Democracy
technologies: Next JS | Nest JS | Typescript | Material UI | MongoDB | Google Earth
description: A product used for structured voting across four time-based slots with configurable timers per phase. Participants raise issues, discuss solutions, cast votes, and produce finalized results.

description: A complete quiz platform for O/A levels and matric students with multiple quiz types—chapter-wise, subject-wise, mock exams, and practice tests—plus progress records, statistics, rankings, and dedicated admin and student portals.

description: Developed a product-based warehouse management system for Finland, also offered as a standalone product, where dynamic modules, permissions, inventory, assets, and RFID labeling are managed. The system integrates Zebra RFID scanner hardware for on-site operations.
